summary: First testing iteration completed. All backend APIs (9/9) and frontend flows tested successfully. Core real-time translation functionality working correctly.

critical.issue: LLM budget exceeded - Emergent LLM key has reached $0.001 budget limit, causing translation failures. Returns proper 500 error with message: 'Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0011422000190734862, Max budget: 0.001'
critical.note: This is NOT a code bug. Error handling is correct. Translation pipeline works when budget available (verified with earlier successful test).

issues: React Native deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, should use 'boxShadow' instead (cosmetic only, no functional impact)

action_items: EXTERNAL: Emergent LLM key budget needs to be increased or reset to continue testing translation functionality
OPTIONAL: Update StyleSheet to use 'boxShadow' instead of deprecated 'shadow*' props (speaker screen fab button)
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All API endpoints properly validate input and return correct status codes
✓ MongoDB _id correctly excluded from responses using {'_id': 0}
✓ Environment variables used correctly (no hardcoded URLs/credentials)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ Error handling is robust - proper error messages returned
✓ Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from env vars
✓ Audio filtering logic prevents noise/hallucinations (obrigado, silence patterns)
seed_data_creation: Created test session TEST99 with sample phrase for projector polling validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core functionality verified and working. LLM budget limitation is external service issue. If retesting translation, ensure Emergent LLM key has available budget or use alternative approach (direct MongoDB insert for phrase testing).

session_management.test_create_session_returns_valid_data: PASS - Creates session with 6-char uppercase alphanumeric code
session_management.test_get_session_with_valid_code: PASS - Returns session data for valid code
session_management.test_get_session_with_invalid_code_retur: PASS - Returns 404 with 'Session not found' message

phrases.test_get_phrases_empty_initially: PASS - Returns empty phrases array for new session
phrases.test_get_phrases_with_since_iso_param: PASS - Accepts and processes since_iso query parameter

transcribe.test_transcribe_with_small_audio_returns: PASS - Skips audio <2000 bytes with reason 'Audio too short'
transcribe.test_transcribe_with_real_portuguese_aud: PASS - Successfully transcribed gTTS Portuguese audio, translated to Italian, and persisted phrase in database (verified with GET)

clear_session.test_clear_session_deletes_phrases: PASS - Returns deleted count (0 for empty session)
clear_session.test_clear_nonexistent_session_returns_4: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid session code

home_screen.loads_correctly: PASS - All elements present (title, caption, cards, buttons, inputs)
home_screen.testIDs_present: PASS - home-screen, start-session-btn, join-code-input, join-projector-btn all found

session_creation.creates_and_navigates: PASS - Clicking 'INIZIA COME SPEAKER' creates session and navigates to /speaker/{CODE}

speaker_screen.displays_session_info: PASS - Shows session code, QR code, 'APRI PROIETTORE' button, mic button
speaker_screen.testIDs_present: PASS - speaker-screen, session-code, projector-qr, mic-record-button all found

projector_join.valid_code: PASS - Entering valid code navigates to /projector/{CODE}
projector_join.invalid_code: PASS - Shows error 'Sessione non trovata' for invalid code

projector_screen.displays_correctly: PASS - Shows LIVE badge with code, translation caption, waiting message when empty
projector_screen.polling_works: PASS - Polls every ~1.4s and displays phrases (verified with seeded data)
projector_screen.displays_phrases: PASS - Shows both Portuguese (small) and Italian (large) text for current phrase
